name: emotion-infographic-studio
description: End-to-end product image to storyboard infographic and video prompt pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Turn product photos into storyboard boards
interface.longDescription: Analyzes a product image, writes campaign context, plans four ad scenes, coordinates start and end frame generation, renders a storyboard infographic PNG, and writes a final video-generation prompt.
defaultPrompt: Create a 15s storyboard board and video prompt.
Generate scene frames, infographic, and final prompt.
